comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION: Before any implementation work, read this entire prompt. Then present a structured summary to the Lead Architect: (a) Milestone objective in your own words (b) List of work items with 1-sentence descriptions (c) Files you will create or modify (d) Validation strategy (e) Any risks or ambiguities you see Then STOP and WAIT for Lead Architect approval. Do NOT create a branch, write files, or run commands until explicit approval is received.

milestone.title: Task 7 / EA-2: Assistant Orchestrator + Semantic Router Audit
milestone.predecessor: Task 7 / EA-1 accepted complete (ledger Entry 39, commit 8834d2c)
milestone.objective: Audit the assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router test suites against docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md and append findings to the existing consolidated artifact at docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md. EA-2 is limited to services/assistant_orchestrator/src, services/assistant_orchestrator/tests, services/semantic_router/src, and services/semantic_router/tests. It must answer the four Task 7 audit questions for these two services only: coverage gaps, stale/dead tests, assertion quality, and boundary correctness. It must also append ledger Entry 40 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md. No production files or test files may be changed.
milestone.scope: Overall Task 7 audit surface: 33 test files and 37 production files across 8 test domains. This EA-2 slice is limited to: - services/assistant_orchestrator/src: 6 production Python files (excluding __init__.py) - services/assistant_orchestrator/tests: 5 test files (excluding __init__.py) - services/semantic_router/src: 3 production Python files (excluding __init__.py) - services/semantic_router/tests: 1 test file (excluding __init__.py)
milestone.deliverable_rule: EA-1 created docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and populated policy_agent findings. EA-2 appends assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings. EA-3 and EA-4 append additional domain findings. EA-5 normalizes the full document and writes the final Prioritized Gap Report and Pre-existing Skip Analysis.
milestone.tiered_methodology: Tier 1 (MANDATORY): inventory and coverage mapping Tier 2 (MANDATORY): full per-file scan for stale tests, assertion quality, and boundary correctness Tier 3 (CONDITIONAL FAIL-SAFE): if you cannot complete the assigned scope without quality degradation, STOP and produce a partial report plus recommended re-scope. Do NOT rush remaining files.

file.description: Append assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings to the existing Task 7 artifact.
Append ledger Entry 40 documenting completion of the assistant_orchestrator + semantic_router audit slice.

forbidden_changes.item: Do NOT modify any file under services/assistant_orchestrator/src/
Do NOT modify any file under services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/
Do NOT modify any file under services/semantic_router/src/
Do NOT modify any file under services/semantic_router/tests/
Do NOT modify docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md for this audit slice
Do NOT create or modify conftest.py
Do NOT add, remove, rename, or fix tests
Do NOT run coverage tooling or install dependencies
Do NOT touch the pre-existing unrelated untracked files in the worktree

item.title: Inventory assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router production and test files
item.description: Build the authoritative file inventory before drawing conclusions.
item.instructions:
Confirm the full assistant_orchestrator production scope is exactly: - circuit_breaker.py - constants.py - context_manager.py - entrypoint.py - gpu_inference.py - pgov.py
Confirm the full assistant_orchestrator test scope is exactly: - test_circuit_breaker.py - test_context_manager.py - test_entrypoint.py - test_gpu_inference.py - test_pgov.py
Confirm the full semantic_router production scope is exactly: - constants.py - intents.py - router.py
Confirm the full semantic_router test scope is exactly: - test_router.py
Exclude __init__.py from the coverage count, but note its existence if relevant to import-path or staleness findings.

item.title: Append Coverage Map findings for both services
item.description: Add assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router coverage findings to the existing Coverage Map section.
item.instructions:
In docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md, preserve all existing EA-1 content. Append new clearly labeled subsections under ## Coverage Map: - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router
Use a format compatible with the existing document. At minimum, each service subsection must map every production file to test file(s) and provide a qualitative coverage assessment with rationale.
Assessment rules: - COVERED: direct test coverage exists and the module appears to satisfy the governance expectation of primary path plus at least one error/edge path for its public behavior. - PARTIAL: some direct or indirect coverage exists, but important public behavior, error handling, or key branches appear untested or under-tested. - NONE: no meaningful corresponding tests were found; incidental coverage from unrelated tests does not count.
All 6 assistant_orchestrator production files and all 3 semantic_router production files must be represented.

item.title: Append Stale Test Inventory findings for both services
item.description: Identify stale imports, dead code references, or superseded behavioral assumptions.
item.instructions:
In docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md, preserve existing EA-1 content and append under ## Stale Test Inventory: - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router
Review all 5 assistant_orchestrator test files and the semantic_router test file, cross-checking tested symbols, import paths, class names, and expected behavior against current production code.
Flag: - references to symbols that no longer exist - imports from dead or renamed modules - tests that still encode superseded architectural assumptions - tests whose stated purpose no longer matches current implementation
If a service has no stale/dead findings, state that explicitly.

item.title: Append Assertion Quality Findings for both services
item.description: Identify weak assertions and tests that prove too little.
item.instructions:
In docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md, preserve existing EA-1 content and append under ## Assertion Quality Findings: - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router
Evaluate all in-scope tests for weak assertion patterns, including: - assert True - bare truthiness assertions without checking value/behavior - assert result is not None when the actual semantic value matters - try/except patterns that swallow failures - tests that only inspect internal implementation details rather than observable behavior - tests whose assertions are too shallow to detect meaningful regressions
For each service: - include a short summary paragraph - include a flat list of specific findings with test file and rationale
If no material assertion-quality findings exist for a service, state that explicitly.

item.title: Append Boundary Violations findings for both services
item.description: Determine whether assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router tests behave like true unit tests under the governance rules.
item.instructions:
In docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md, preserve existing EA-1 content and append under ## Boundary Violations: - ### assistant_orchestrator - ### semantic_router
Evaluate whether any in-scope tests: - make real socket connections - perform real filesystem writes beyond acceptable isolated test scaffolding - depend on live services, hardware, or manual setup - should really be integration tests rather than service-level unit tests
Apply the Task 6 governance rule strictly: service-level tests under services/*/tests/ should be unit tests unless there is a compelling reason they belong elsewhere.
For each violation or borderline case, record: - test file - observed behavior - why it violates or strains the intended boundary - recommended reclassification or remediation direction
If no material boundary violations exist for a service, state that explicitly.

item.title: Maintain the consolidated document contract while appending new findings
item.description: Append cleanly to the existing Task 7 artifact without breaking the accepted EA-1 structure.
item.instructions:
docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md must continue to contain exactly these 6 top-level sections in this exact order:
1. ## Coverage Map 2. ## Stale Test Inventory 3. ## Assertion Quality Findings 4. ## Boundary Violations 5. ## Prioritized Gap Report 6. ## Pre-existing Skip Analysis
For EA-2: - Preserve all accepted EA-1 findings. - Append assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings only. - Do NOT rewrite or re-litigate EA-1 conclusions. - Sections 5 and 6 must remain exactly: "Deferred to EA-5 synthesis."
You MAY make minimal preamble/title adjustments if needed to ensure the document no longer reads as policy_agent-only. If you do so, keep the change minimal and do not create any new top-level sections.
Do NOT write the final prioritized remediation ordering yet. Do NOT disposition any pre-existing skipped tests yet.

item.title: Record ledger Entry 40
item.description: Append Entry 40 documenting completion of the assistant_orchestrator + semantic_router audit slice.
item.instructions:
Follow the existing ledger format.
Required content: - Title: Entry 40 — Task 7/EA-2: Assistant Orchestrator + Semantic Router Audit (COMPLETE) - Date: 2026-04-18 or actual execution date - Branch: feature/p5-task7-ea2-assistant-orchestrator-semantic-router-audit - Predecessor: Entry 39 — Task 7/EA-1 Policy Agent Audit - Type: AUDIT / DOCS-ONLY - Disposition: COMPLETE - Summary: EA-2 completed; assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings appended to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md; sections 5–6 remain deferred to EA-5. - Files: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md only

item.title: Enforce strict DOC_ONLY branch hygiene
item.description: Preserve existing out-of-scope worktree state and stage only the two allowed docs files.
item.instructions:
Do NOT use git add .
Stage only: - docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md
The authoritative DOC_ONLY gate for this milestone is the staged diff against 8834d2c. After staging only the two allowed files, the diff must show only those files.

item.title: Tier 3 fail-safe
item.description: If the full assistant_orchestrator + semantic_router audit cannot be completed to quality within one session, stop cleanly.
item.instructions: If you determine mid-session that you cannot finish all 9 production files and 6 test files without degraded quality: - STOP - leave a partial but clearly labeled report in docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - record the partial completion status in ledger Entry 40 - provide a recommended re-scope for the SDO Do NOT compress the remaining review into superficial findings.

context_notes.note: docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md already exists on the accepted EA-1 branch at commit 8834d2c. EA-2 must append to that artifact, not recreate it from main.
docs/TEST_GOVERNANCE.md is the governing standard for this audit. Use its scope definitions, marker policy, boundary rules, and coverage expectations as the audit rubric.

pyproject.toml defines: - testpaths including services/assistant_orchestrator/tests and services/semantic_router/tests - addopts = "--strict-markers -v --import-mode=importlib -m 'not slow'" - registered markers: asyncio, slow No slow-marker usage is expected in these service test directories.

Numeric coverage tooling is out of scope. This audit is based on careful code-to-test mapping and qualitative adequacy against the Task 6 governance rule: public behavior should have happy-path and error/edge-path test coverage.
semantic_router has only 3 production files and 1 test file, but it still requires the full four-dimension audit: coverage gaps, stale/dead tests, assertion quality, and boundary correctness.
This is a diagnosis-only audit. The EA must not fix any finding, add any test, or modify any source/test file.
The final Prioritized Gap Report and the final Pre-existing Skip Analysis are not written in this slice. EA-2 must leave those sections exactly deferred.

gate.criteria: No Python files may be created or modified in this milestone.

Do not run pytest as a standard gate for this slice. Use file inspection as the primary evidence source. If you choose to run a targeted read-only command to confirm a suspected stale reference, report it explicitly.

gate.command: Manual audit completion against the 9 production files and 6 test files in scope
gate.criteria: All 6 assistant_orchestrator production files, all 5 assistant_orchestrator test files, all 3 semantic_router production files, and the semantic_router test file are evaluated.

The document still contains all 6 required top-level sections in order. assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router findings are appended under sections 1–4. Sections 5–6 remain exactly "Deferred to EA-5 synthesis."
If the full scope was not completable without quality degradation, the EA stopped, produced a partial report, and recommended a re-scope instead of rushing.

verification.instruction: The Lead Architect will use terminal commands only. Provide a result set that these commands can confirm.

commands.expected: Single EA-2 audit commit on the feature branch
commands.command: Select-String -Path docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md -Pattern "^## ","^### assistant_orchestrator","^### semantic_router","Deferred to EA-5 synthesis"
commands.expected: Shows the same 6 top-level sections, new assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router subsections, and the unchanged deferred placeholders
Ledger contains Entry 40 for Task 7 / EA-2

commit_template.message:
Task 7 EA-2: Audit assistant_orchestrator and semantic_router test quality
- Appended assistant_orchestrator findings to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - Appended semantic_router findings to docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md - Preserved deferred sections for Prioritized Gap Report and Pre-existing Skip Analysis - Recorded ledger Entry 40 in Post-Operational Maturation Ledger
DOC_ONLY gate: staged diff against 8834d2c contains only docs/TEST_AUDIT_FINDINGS.md and docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md

attachments.instruction: Attach the following files when creating the EA-2 session:

file.reason: Root pytest configuration and marker policy source
Existing consolidated Task 7 findings artifact to append to
